quoteLast: , on the morning of a Thursday, that I sat pondering in my mind the ques-ti-on what to do with the butter and the veg-et-ables. Here was butter, and here was green corn and limabeans and trophy tomats, far more than I ere could use. And here was a horse, idly cropping the fol-i-age in the field, for as my employer had advis-ed and order-ed, I had put the steed to grass.
title:
The Humour of America
Selected, with an Introduction and Index of American Humorists
author: Abbott, Angus Evan, 1862-1923 [Compiler]; Brock, C. E. (Charles Edmund), 1870-1938 [Illustrator]
